test_commands:
docker run --rm --entrypoint sh $IMAGE_REF -c "cat >/usr/local/bin/pihole-exporter <<'EOF'
#!/bin/sh
env
EOF
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/pihole-exporter && mkdir -p /run/secrets && printf '  test-token  
' > /run/secrets/pihole_api_token && /entrypoint.sh | grep -q 'PIHOLE_API_TOKEN=test-token'"
